items.title: Two Sum
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 1: Two Sum (https://leetcode.com/problems/two-sum/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved optimally in O(N) time and O(N) space.
B: Solved using O(N^2) brute force.
C: Ran out of bounds or threw Null/Undefined errors.
D: Stuck on finding matching indices.

items.title: Contains Duplicate
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 217: Contains Duplicate (https://leetcode.com/problems/contains-duplicate/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using a hash set.
B: Solved in O(N log N) using sorting.
C: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) using nested loops.
D: Stuck on checking duplicates.

items.title: Group Anagrams
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 49: Group Anagrams (https://leetcode.com/problems/group-anagrams/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N * K) time by hashing character frequency arrays.
B: Solved in O(N * K log K) by sorting each string key.
C: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) or key collision errors.
D: Stuck on tracking anagram groups.

items.title: Top K Frequent Elements
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 347: Top K Frequent Elements (https://leetcode.com/problems/top-k-frequent-elements/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time using bucket sort.
B: Solved in O(N log K) using a heap/priority queue.
C: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) by sorting frequency pairs.
D: Stuck on counting frequencies.

options.B: Solved in O(N log K) heap

items.title: Valid Palindrome
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 125: Valid Palindrome (https://leetcode.com/problems/valid-palindrome/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space with left/right pointers meeting in the middle.
B: Solved by reversing the string with O(N) auxiliary memory.
C: Got pointer index out of bounds exceptions.
D: Stuck on ignoring non-alphanumeric characters.

items.title: Two Sum II
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 167: Two Sum II - Input Array Is Sorted (https://leetcode.com/problems/two-sum-ii-input-array-is-sorted/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space adjusting left/right indices based on sum comparison.
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using a hash map.
C: Loop ran infinitely or indices went out of bounds.
D: Stuck on moving pointers.

items.title: 3Sum
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 15: 3Sum (https://leetcode.com/problems/3sum/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N^2) by sorting and running left/right pointers per element, avoiding duplicate triplets.
B: Solved but required hash sets to prune duplicate answers after output.
C: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) due to nested loops.
D: Stuck on duplicate avoidance logic.

options.A: Solved in O(N^2) with duplicate skipping

items.title: Trapping Rain Water
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 42: Trapping Rain Water (https://leetcode.com/problems/trapping-rain-water/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space using left/right boundary max height pointers.
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using prefix/suffix max arrays.
C: Got wrong calculations or index errors.
D: Stuck on math logic.

items.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 121: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock (https://leetcode.com/problems/best-time-to-buy-and-sell-stock/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space using a single pass sliding left boundary min price.
B: Solved using O(N^2) brute force.
C: Got incorrect profit outcomes or range index errors.
D: Stuck on when to update boundaries.

items.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 3: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters (https://leetcode.com/problems/longest-substring-without-repeating-characters/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time using sliding window right pointer expansions and left pointer shrinks via character index map.
B: Solved in O(N) using a visited set with repetitive left increments.
C: Got incorrect length calculations or off-by-one window sizes.
D: Stuck on tracking character occurrences.

items.title: Minimum Size Subarray Sum
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 209: Minimum Size Subarray Sum (https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-size-subarray-sum/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time by expanding right bounds, and contracting left bounds in a inner while loop when sum >= target.
B: Solved in O(N log N) using binary search and prefix sums.
C: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) using nested loops.
D: Stuck on dynamically shrinking window size.

options.B: Solved O(N log N) binary search

items.title: Minimum Window Substring
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 76: Minimum Window Substring (https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-window-substring/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(S + T) time using frequency counts window map and matched-char tracking variable.
B: Solved but got time limits or character match omissions.
C: Got index out of bounds exceptions on substring output slices.
D: Stuck on frequency map checks.

options.C: Got index out of range exceptions

items.title: Reverse Linked List
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 206: Reverse Linked List (https://leetcode.com/problems/reverse-linked-list/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space iteratively swapping next pointers.
B: Solved recursively using recursion stack O(N) space.
C: Got NullPointer exceptions on reference traversal.
D: Stuck on temp pointer swaps.

items.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 21: Merge Two Sorted Lists (https://leetcode.com/problems/merge-two-sorted-lists/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N + M) time iteratively using a dummy head node to attach comparisons.
B: Solved recursively in O(N + M) space.
C: Got NullPointer exception on boundary comparisons.
D: Stuck on merging node pointers.

items.title: Remove Nth Node From End of List
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 19: Remove Nth Node From End of List (https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-nth-node-from-end-of-list/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time using two pointers spaced N elements apart, along with a dummy node.
B: Solved in two passes by first counting node length.
C: Got NullPointer exception when removing the first node.
D: Stuck on boundary nodes swaps.

items.title: Reorder List
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 143: Reorder List (https://leetcode.com/problems/reorder-list/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space by finding the middle element, reversing the second half, and merging alternately.
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using an array copy of node references.
C: Got NullPointer exception or cycle link leaks.
D: Stuck on list intersection.

options.A: Solved O(1) space middle reverse merge

items.title: Linked List Cycle
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 141: Linked List Cycle (https://leetcode.com/problems/linked-list-cycle/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space using fast/slow pointers (Floyd's cycle detection).
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using a visited Set.
C: Got infinite loop or NullPointer exception on fast.next.next.
D: Stuck on moving fast pointer.

items.title: Linked List Cycle II
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 142: Linked List Cycle II (https://leetcode.com/problems/linked-list-cycle-ii/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space resetting one pointer to the head after meeting to find cycle start node.
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space using a visited Set.
C: Reset pointer meeting loop ran infinitely.
D: Stuck on meeting math.

options.A: Solved O(1) space start node meeting

items.title: Find the Duplicate Number
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 287: Find the Duplicate Number (https://leetcode.com/problems/find-the-duplicate-number/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space by treating values as next indices and running Floyd's cycle detection.
B: Solved by sorting the array in O(N log N) time (violates O(1) space constraint).
C: Got infinite cycle index checks.
D: Stuck on mapping value to index.

items.title: Palindrome Linked List
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 234: Palindrome Linked List (https://leetcode.com/problems/palindrome-linked-list/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) time and O(1) space using fast/slow to find middle, reversing second half, and comparing indices.
B: Solved in O(N) time and O(N) space copying values to an array.
C: Got NullPointer exceptions during half reverse.
D: Stuck on comparing node halves.

options.A: Solved O(1) space middle reverse check

items.title: Fibonacci Number
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 509: Fibonacci Number (https://leetcode.com/problems/fibonacci-number/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively with proper base cases n <= 1.
B: Solved iteratively in O(N) time.
C: Got stack overflow due to missing base case check.
D: Stuck on recursive relation.

items.title: Remove Linked List Elements (Recursive)
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 203: Remove Linked List Elements (https://leetcode.com/problems/remove-linked-list-elements/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively returning head.next or head depending on comparison.
B: Solved iteratively using dummy node.
C: Got stack overflow on long lists.
D: Stuck on recursive link updates.

items.title: Pow(x, n)
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 50: Pow(x, n) (https://leetcode.com/problems/powx-n/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(log N) recursively splitting power n / 2 and managing base case n = 0.
B: Solved iteratively in O(N) time (Got Time Limit Exceeded).
C: Got stack overflow for negative power inputs.
D: Stuck on even/odd power handling.

items.title: Reverse String (Recursive)
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 344: Reverse String (https://leetcode.com/problems/reverse-string/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively swapping left/right characters until bounds cross.
B: Solved iteratively in O(N).
C: Got stack overflow on recursion bounds.
D: Stuck on swap indices.

items.title: Invert Binary Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 226: Invert Binary Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/invert-binary-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved by recursively swapping left and right child references.
B: Solved iteratively using a queue (BFS).
C: Got NullPointer exceptions on node child references.
D: Stuck on swapping logic.

items.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 104: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/maximum-depth-of-binary-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively returning 1 + Math.max(leftDepth, rightDepth).
B: Solved iteratively using a queue.
C: Got NullPointer exception on empty tree input.
D: Stuck on leaf node returns.

items.title: Diameter of Binary Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 543: Diameter of Binary Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/diameter-of-binary-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively updating a global max diameter variable during height DFS calculation.
B: Solved in O(N^2) by calling height recursively for each node.
C: Got incorrect calculation values.
D: Stuck on path count logic.

options.A: Solved O(N) using global max update

items.title: Balanced Binary Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 110: Balanced Binary Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/balanced-binary-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved in O(N) by returning -1 for height if any subtree is unbalanced during recursive DFS.
B: Solved in O(N^2) checking height balance per node.
C: Got incorrect balance flags.
D: Stuck on tracking state.

items.title: Same Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 100: Same Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/same-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively checking root values, and child matching preorder.
B: Got NullPointer exceptions on child leaf nodes.
C: Got wrong matching flags.
D: Stuck on null value checks.

items.title: Symmetric Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 101: Symmetric Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/symmetric-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively comparing left-child's-left with right-child's-right.
B: Got NullPointer exception on uneven trees.
C: Got wrong symmetric flags.
D: Stuck on cross child matching.

items.title: Lowest Common Ancestor
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 236: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/lowest-common-ancestor-of-a-binary-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively returning node if matched p/q, or returning left/right check intersection.
B: Got NullPointer exception on empty branches.
C: Output returned incorrect ancestor node.
D: Stuck on tracking parent pointers.

items.title: Binary Tree Max Path Sum
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 124: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum (https://leetcode.com/problems/binary-tree-maximum-path-sum/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively computing max branch gain, updating global sum containing left + right + node.val.
B: Got wrong sums containing negative node values.
C: Got NullPointer exception on leaves.
D: Stuck on gain logic.

options.B: Got incorrect sum on negative nodes

items.title: Number of Islands
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 200: Number of Islands (https://leetcode.com/problems/number-of-islands/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved using nested grid loops, launching DFS on '1' and changing visited cells to '0'.
B: Solved using BFS with visited sets.
C: Got StackOverflow error due to infinite recursion.
D: Stuck on tracking island boundaries.

options.A: Solved using DFS visited cell modification

items.title: Max Area of Island
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 695: Max Area of Island (https://leetcode.com/problems/max-area-of-island/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved returning 1 + sum of DFS on 4 directions, updating max variable.
B: Got stack overflow on grid boundary inputs.
C: Island area sums were calculated incorrectly.
D: Stuck on 4-directional grid offsets.

items.title: Rotting Oranges
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 994: Rotting Oranges (https://leetcode.com/problems/rotting-oranges/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved using multi-source BFS queue counting levels/minutes.
B: Got wrong time counts due to using DFS (DFS is incorrect for shortest path level-order).
C: Got index out of bounds exceptions on grid offsets.
D: Stuck on tracking fresh oranges count.

options.C: Got index out of bounds errors

items.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 417: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow (https://leetcode.com/problems/pacific-atlantic-water-flow/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved by running DFS outwards from ocean boundary cells and finding intersection sets.
B: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) running DFS from every individual grid cell.
C: Got infinite stack recursion cycles.
D: Stuck on height flow comparison.

options.B: Got Time Limit Exceeded from every cell

items.title: Clone Graph
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 133: Clone Graph (https://leetcode.com/problems/clone-graph/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved using DFS with an index map matching original nodes to cloned nodes to avoid infinite cycles.
B: Got StackOverflow/infinite loop because of circular reference cycles.
C: Got incomplete clone nodes mapping.
D: Stuck on copying graph neighbors.

options.A: Solved using DFS with cloned nodes map

items.title: Number of Connected Components
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 323: Number of Connected Components in an Undirected Graph (https://leetcode.com/problems/number-of-connected-components-in-an-undirected-graph/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved iterating through all nodes, running DFS to populate visited set, counting components.
B: Got infinite cycle stuck because of undirected edges.
C: Got wrong component count values.
D: Stuck on building adjacency list.

items.title: Graph Valid Tree
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 261: Graph Valid Tree (https://leetcode.com/problems/graph-valid-tree/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved verifying count is components = 1 and edges = nodes - 1, running DFS to check cycles.
B: Got incorrect tree status on disconnected graphs.
C: Loop ran infinitely due to back-edge cycles.
D: Stuck on cycle logic.

options.A: Solved components and cycle check DFS
options.B: Got wrong result on disconnected components

items.title: Alien Dictionary
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 269: Alien Dictionary (https://leetcode.com/problems/alien-dictionary/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved building character dependency graph and using post-order DFS to detect cycles and return sorted string.
B: Got invalid orderings on cycle dependency test inputs.
C: Stack overflow occurred on cycle dependency check.
D: Stuck on parsing input words.

items.title: Subsets
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 78: Subsets (https://leetcode.com/problems/subsets/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved recursively adding subsets to list, pushing element, recursing, and popping (backtracking).
B: Solved iteratively using bitwise masks.
C: Output contained incorrect duplicate element sets.
D: Stuck on backtracking choices.

items.title: Permutations
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 46: Permutations (https://leetcode.com/problems/permutations/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved by swapping array elements recursively or tracking used elements in a boolean array, undoing changes.
B: Output contained duplicate elements or incomplete permutations.
C: State variables were dirty and leaked across branches.
D: Stuck on backtracking loops.

items.title: Combination Sum
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 39: Combination Sum (https://leetcode.com/problems/combination-sum/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved backtracking on indices and target remaining sum, using pop to restore state.
B: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) because index boundary checks were missing.
C: Output list contained incorrect sum calculations.
D: Stuck on index reuse limits.

items.title: N-Queens
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 51: N-Queens (https://leetcode.com/problems/n-queens/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved placing queens row-by-row, tracking diagonals/cols in Set collections and backtracking on pop.
B: Got invalid board placements where queens attacked each other.
C: Got dirty board states leaking across backtrack steps.
D: Stuck on diagonal math checks.

items.title: Course Schedule
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 207: Course Schedule (https://leetcode.com/problems/course-schedule/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved building dependency graph, running cycle checks via DFS (visited, visiting states), returning true/false.
B: Got incorrect boolean outputs on cycle graphs.
C: Got stack overflow cycle checking.
D: Stuck on building adjacency list.

items.title: Course Schedule II
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 210: Course Schedule II (https://leetcode.com/problems/course-schedule-ii/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved using Kahn's algorithm (BFS queue with in-degree array) or DFS post-order to output node order.
B: Output ordering was invalid or cyclic.
C: Cycle loops returned incorrect schedules.
D: Stuck on handling in-degrees.

items.title: Minimum Height Trees
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 310: Minimum Height Trees (https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-height-trees/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved iteratively trimming leaf nodes (degree = 1) in a topological BFS queue until <= 2 nodes remain.
B: Got Time Limit Exceeded (TLE) running height calculations from every node.
C: Got wrong root nodes output.
D: Stuck on leaves trimming conditions.

options.B: Got Time Limit Exceeded from every node

items.title: Sort Items by Groups
items.question_text:
Solve LeetCode 1203: Sort Items by Groups Respecting Dependencies (https://leetcode.com/problems/sort-items-by-groups-respecting-dependencies/). Select your outcome:

A: Solved executing double topological sorting (once for groups, once for items) and mapping orderings.
B: Got invalid orderings on cyclic dependencies.
C: Sorting got stuck in infinite loops.
D: Stuck on separating group structures.
